name: Almond Ricotta Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Press moisture out of the ricotta cheese.
3. Scald the milk and pour over the beaten eggs.
4. Pour the mixture into a blender or food processor and add the remaining ingredients.
5. Beat until combined.
6. Pour into a shallow buttered dish and dust with cinnamon or nutmeg.
7. Sprinkle thinly sliced almonds on top.
8. Place the casserole dish inside a larger pan partially filled with hot water.
9. Cook for 45 minutes at 350°F.
10. To test if done, insert a knife near the edge of the dish. If it comes out clean, the custard is ready when cool.
11. Let cool before serving. Top with chocolate curls if desired.
